title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the National Sports Governance Act, 2025. (2) It shall come into force on such date1 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint, and different dates may be appointed for different provisions of this Act, and any reference in any such provision to the commencement of this Act shall be construed as a reference to the coming into force of that provision.
footnote: 1. 31st day of December, 2025--- Ss.1 to 3, sub-sections (1), (2) and (4) of section 4, sub-sections (1) and (2) of section 5, sub-section (5) of section 8, sub-section (1) of section 11, section 14, section 15, sub-sections (1) to (7) and (10) of section 17, section 30, section 31, section 33 to 38, vide notification no. S.O. 6152 (E), dated 1st January, 2026, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, s. 3(ii).
